pattern: Two pointers peel matching equal-character blocks from both ends until the ends differ or collapse.
hints: Only the characters at the two ends matter for each operation; the interior is untouched until the ends are removed.
Use a left and right pointer; when both ends hold the same character, advance each inward past the entire run of that character.
Stop when the pointers cross or the two ends differ, then the remaining count is right minus left plus one (or zero if crossed).

edge_inputs.description: all same with even length collapses to zero
long equal run on both ends around a different core

stress.description: random string over a, b, c so peeling stops at varied points
